title: Business objectives in the private sector and public sector
summary: 9609 AS — profit, growth, survival, CSR, and public sector service objectives.

simpleExplanation.title: What businesses aim for
simpleExplanation.summary: Private firms often prioritise profit and growth; public sector organisations focus on service provision and value for money.
steps: Private: profit maximisation, growth, market share.
Survival in early years or recession.
Public: service levels, cost coverage, equity.

sections.content: **Business objectives** (1.4.1) vary by **sector and life cycle**. Link objective to **stakeholder** conflicts in evaluation.
